name: 工造炮台
text: 射程 2,移速 1。装配模块来升级它。每方场上至多一座。
art_prompt: a compact early-stage automated cannon turret on a bolted tripod, one short narrow modest-caliber barrel, exposed empty mounting rails ready for modules, glowing brass sight, capable but visibly unfinished and not intimidating

name: 哨戒炮
text: 射程 2,架设。
art_prompt: a small freshly-unfolded sentry turret, single ballista bolt loaded

name: 加长炮管
text: 装配:炮台射程 +1(总射程上限 4)。
art_prompt: a long extended brass gun barrel with fine sighting rings, laid on a workbench, muzzle toward the viewer, centered prop on dark ground

name: 重铸炮膛
text: 装配:炮台攻击力 +2。
art_prompt: a thick reinforced cannon breech and firing chamber, stacked reinforcing rings, heavy iron prop centered on dark ground

name: 贯穿膛线
text: 装配:炮台获得贯穿。
art_prompt: a gun barrel cutaway showing spiraled rifling grooves down the bore, brass sighting arrays sighting along a line, prop centered on dark ground

name: 分裂弹药
text: 装配:远程命中后,目标相邻的随机一个其他敌方随从受一半伤害(向上取整)。
art_prompt: a splitting twin-headed artillery shell forking into two projectiles mid-air, brass casing, prop centered on dark ground

name: 破片榴弹
text: 装配:溅射Ⅰ — 远程命中后,与目标相邻的所有敌方随从各受 1 点伤害。
art_prompt: a segmented fragmentation shell with a scored casing bursting into shrapnel, brass fuse, prop centered on dark ground

name: 燎原榴弹
text: 装配:溅射Ⅱ — 远程命中后,与目标相邻的所有敌方随从各受一半伤害(向上取整)。同系分级同装取最高。
art_prompt: a heavy siege mortar shell wreathed in a wide blast ring, glowing hot casing, prop centered on dark ground

name: 汲能弹头
text: 装配:吸血Ⅰ — 攻击造成伤害后,炮台 +0/+1(直接增加生命,可超过上限)。
art_prompt: a brass artillery shell with faint glowing siphon runes etched along the casing, thin luminous conduits feeding back into a small reservoir vial at its base

name: 汲能核心
text: 装配:吸血Ⅱ — 攻击造成伤害后,炮台 +0/+攻击力一半(向下取整,直接增加生命,可超过上限)。同系分级同装取最高。
art_prompt: a heavy shell core wrapped in coiled energy-siphon tubing, deep red-gold vital glow pulsing through glass gauges, drops of light flowing backward along the coils

name: 震撼弹
text: 装配:远程命中后,目标迟缓(下回合无法移动)。
art_prompt: a stubby concussion shell with a blunt hammer-shaped head, shockwave rings engraved on the casing, faint radiating tremor lines in the air around it

name: 架设平台
text: 装配:+1/+3,坚守;炮台无法移动(视同架设,可吃重新部署;炮台不吃架设的额外效果伤)。
art_prompt: a heavy anchored gun platform with pylons driven into rock, sandbag skirt, immovable siege mount, prop centered on dark ground

name: 履带底盘
text: 装配:炮台移速 +1。
art_prompt: a pair of heavy iron caterpillar tracks and drive wheels on a reinforced undercarriage frame, mud-caked treads, tow chains coiled at the side

name: 快速装填机
text: 装配:炮台每回合可攻击两次。
art_prompt: a whirring autoloader mechanism with a revolving shell drum and brass gears, every gauge past red, prop centered on dark ground

name: 自毁保险舱
text: 不占模块位(炮台仍可另装 5 个升级模块)。亡语(炮台被击毁时):随机保住其余在装模块中的 2 件,你的下一座炮台落成时自动装上;随后本保险舱作废。
art_prompt: a sealed welded-shut armored failsafe capsule with heavy latches and a blinking safety light, prop centered on dark ground

name: 主炮核心·贯日
art_prompt: a colossal fortress cannon core with a brass sun emblem, barrel longer than a house, anchored on iron legs

name: 齿轮学徒
text: 战吼:一个友方随从 +0/+1。
art_prompt: a young dwarf apprentice hauling an oversized wrench and a belt of spare gears

name: 尖桩拒马
text: 嘲讽。
art_prompt: a bolted-down spiked barricade frame, wooden stakes and iron braces, immovable

name: 短管铳手
text: 射程 2。
art_prompt: a stout dwarf with a short wide-barreled scattergun, smoke curling from the muzzle

name: 护炮班组
text: 亡语:若你的炮台在场,你的炮台 +0/+2。
art_prompt: a dwarf gun crew member with rammer and powder satchel tending the line, ready to feed the guns

name: 抢修工兵
text: 战吼:一个随从恢复 2 点生命。
art_prompt: an engineer in a heavy apron welding a dented automaton plate, sparks flying

name: 战线工程师
text: 战吼:一个友方随从获得嘲讽。
art_prompt: a foreman dwarf unrolling blueprints while a wall frame rises behind him

name: 齿轮工长
text: 战吼:若你的炮台在场,你的炮台 +1/+1。
art_prompt: a gear-foreman throwing a master lever, the turret on the line spinning up hotter

name: 回收小队
text: 战吼:抽 1 张牌。
art_prompt: a salvage crew hauling scrap and parts back from a wreck, one holding a recovered schematic

name: 装甲运载车
text: 坚守。
art_prompt: a heavy armored steam-hauler grinding forward on iron treads, escorting the guns

name: 铁甲战体
text: 嘲讽。
art_prompt: a walking ironclad automaton with a furnace chest and shield-plate arms

name: 移动要塞
text: 守护,坚守。
art_prompt: a walking fortress-crawler the size of a gatehouse grinding forward on massive legs

name: 首席大匠·维尔达
text: 战吼:若你的炮台在场,在维尔达相邻的空格放置一座影子炮台(完整复制你炮台当前的面板、模块与状态——含已损失的生命与所有增益/减益;长期存在,直到被消灭)。
art_prompt: a master artificer-woman surrounded by deploying gun parts and blueprints, the whole line lighting up

name: 重新部署
text: 一个友方架设随从本回合可移动一格。
art_prompt: a dwarf crew unbolting a turret from its mount and rolling it to a new firing position, sparks and chains

name: 紧急抢修
text: 一个随从恢复 4 点生命。
art_prompt: mechanics swarming a smoking turret with hammers and rivet guns

name: 空投哨戒炮
text: 在你的底线行召唤两座 1/2 哨戒炮(射程 2、架设)。
art_prompt: supply crates cracking open mid-airdrop, sentry turrets unfolding their legs

name: 战地重构
text: 将历史池中当前未在装的模块随机 2 个装回你的炮台(空位不足则装到满;无合法目标不可使用)。
art_prompt: engineers digging in the gun line with sandbags and salvaged plating, refitting an emplacement from a parts crate

name: 镜像工坊
text: 复制你炮台上的一件在装模块并装配(无视同名唯一;需 1 个空位;开关类复制无增益)。
art_prompt: twin mechanical arms holding up two identical glowing gun components face to face over a workbench, mirrored highlights, blueprint scrolls and calipers scattered below
